creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197634
Lightscreen.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that adds deskutils/Lightscreen to the ports tree. 

It's a simple tool to automate the tedious process of saving and cataloging screenshots, it operates as a hidden background process that is invoked with one (or multiple) hotkeys and then saves a screenshot file to disk according to the user's preferences.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4- and 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA8 amd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK
